score_rationale: Excellent relevance to the pregnant teacher profile (31yo, 5500 income, pregnancy confirmed). The cross-domain insight linking pregnancy anxiety to defensive consumption and information overload from parenting reading (74% of reading topics) is genuinely novel. Specificity is adequate (medical 320 yuan, dining 1476 yuan at 60%, 55.8% savings rate) but some data citations feel inferred rather than directly grounded. Recommendations are highly contextual to pregnancy (post-birth fund, information diet, non-parenting joy sources) making them more actionable than typical templated advice.
